ORDER FOR DISCHARGE AND AWARD OF ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, CROSS-COMPLAINANT WESTBAY COMMERCIAL REAL ESTATE GROUP, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. THE COURT DID NOT LOCATE A SEPARATE STATEMENT IN SUPPORT OF THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ON FILE. TO THE EXTENT THE DOCUMENT TITLED "SEPARATE STATEMENT OF MATERIAL FACTS IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION" WAS MEANT TO SERVE AS SUCH SEPARATE STATEMENT CONTRARY TO THE LANGUAGE ON LINES 8 AND 9 ON PAGE 2 OF THIS DOCUMENT ("MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. THE UNDISPUTED FACTS AND SUPPORTING EVIDENCE IN SUPPORT OF WESTBAY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT ARE AS FOLLOWS:"), THIS SEPARATE STATEMENT IN NOT IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1350(B). MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO SHIFT ITS BURDEN. MULTIPLE FACTS ARE PURPORTEDLY SUPPORTED BY "DECLARATION OF ANDREW PECEIMER." THERE IS NO SUCH DECLARATION ON FILE. FURTHERMORE, THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT, INCLUDING, FACTS 14 AND 17. OBJECTIONS TO GILMORE DECLARATION PARAGRAPHS 10,11, 17,18,19, 20, AND 21 OVERRULED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jan-19-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Stephanie A. Foster; SSL Law Firm LLP; 415-814-6400; appearing as counsel for defendant and cross-complainant Westbay Commercial Real Estate Group, Inc. dba Coldwell Banker Commercial Westbay Real Estate Group.
Paul V. Gilmore; 415-699-1144; cross-defendant and cross-complainant, appearing in pro per.

Ms. Foster contests the court's tentative decision. The Declaration of Andrew Peceimer is discussed. Ms. Foster states that the Peceimer Declaration was not filed due to a courier error, and requests a continuance of the hearing so that she get the declaration filed and submitted to the court for review. The court denies Ms. Foster's request for a continuance. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS-COMPLAINANT WESTBAY COMMERCIAL REAL ESTATE GROUP, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is DENIED. Motion for Summary Adjudication is DENIED. The Court did not locate a separate statement in support of the motion for summary adjudication on file. To the extent the document titled "Separate Statement of Material Facts in Support of Motion for Summary Judgment or, in the Alternative, Summary Adjudication" was meant to serve as such separate statement contrary to the language on lines 8 and 9 on page 2 of this document ("Motion for Summary Judgment. The undisputed facts and supporting evidence in support of Westbay's Motion for Summary Judgment are as follows:"), this separate statement in not in compliance with CRC 3.1350(b). Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden. Multiple facts are purportedly supported by "Declaration of Andrew Peceimer." There is no such declaration on file. Furthermore, there are triable issues of fact, including, facts 14 and 17. Objections to Gilmore declaration paragraphs 10,11, 17,18,19, 20, and 21 overruled.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
